items.title: GDT-VLM accepted to ICMR 2026
items.content: Our work on global distribution modeling for visual token compression in efficient MLLMs was accepted to ACM ICMR 2026.

items.title: DALIP accepted to ICCV 2025
items.content: Our work on distribution alignment-based language-image pre-training for domain-specific data was accepted to ICCV 2025.

items.title: AFBO accepted to ICLR 2025
items.content: Our work on asymmetric factorized bilinear operations for Vision Transformers was accepted to ICLR 2025.

items.title: Asymmetric Factorized Bilinear Operation for Vision Transformer
items.description: A higher-order visual representation method for Vision Transformers using asymmetric factorized bilinear operations and structured sparse channel mappings.
items.authors: **Authors:** **Junjie Wu**, Qilong Wang†, Jiangtao Xie, Pengfei Zhu, Qinghua Hu

items.title: Distribution Alignment-based Language-Image Pre-Training for Domain-Specific Data
items.description: A domain-specific vision-language pre-training method that aligns image-text feature distributions and models second-order token statistics.
items.authors: **Authors:** **Junjie Wu***, Jiangtao Xie*, Zhaolin Zhang, Qilong Wang†, Qinghua Hu, Peihua Li, Sen Xu

items.title: Effective Visual Token Aggregation for Improving ViT Classification
items.description: A visual token aggregation study for improving ViT classification through cross-covariance token pooling.
items.authors: **Authors:** Jiangtao Xie*, Zhaolin Zhang*, Ruiren Zeng*, **Junjie Wu**, Qilong Wang, Peihua Li†

items.title: GDT-VLM: Global Distribution Modeling for Visual Token Compression in Efficient MLLMs
items.description: A visual token compression method for efficient MLLMs that preserves global visual distribution information under severe token budgets.
items.authors: **Authors:** Jiangtao Xie*, **Junjie Wu***, Zhaolin Zhang, Qilong Wang, Peihua Li†

items.degree: B.Eng. in Computer Science and Technology, GPA: 3.7/4.0, top 15%

items.title: Graduate Researcher, Machine Learning and Data Mining Laboratory
items.description: Advised by Prof. Qilong Wang. Developed higher-order visual representations for ViTs, domain-specific vision-language pre-training methods, and efficient visual token aggregation/compression methods for ViTs and MLLMs.

items.title: Summer Research Intern
items.description: Collaborated with Prof. Pengtao Xie on foundation models for mRNA gene annotation and chest X-ray representation learning.

items.title: Algorithm Researcher
items.description: Built domain-specific multimodal data and model pipelines for low-resource applications, including data construction, supervised fine-tuning, preference optimization, RAG, evaluation, and vLLM deployment.

items.title: Silver Award, China International Internet+ Innovation and Entrepreneurship Competition
